title: Smoky Crumbly Brazilian Dates Bowl
description: Smoky dates mingle with toasted walnuts and creamy Greek yogurt for a crunchy, flavorful brunch bowl. Finished with fresh cilantro and a drizzle of maple syrup, it offers a low‑calorie, brunch‑ready treat.
instructions: Heat a medium skillet over medium heat and add the olive oil.
Add the pitted dates, smoked paprika, cumin, pepper, and salt; sauté for 4–5 minutes until the dates soften and take on a slightly caramelized edge.
Pour in the almond milk and stir, letting the liquid reduce into a sticky, fragrant sauce for about 2 minutes.
Transfer the sautéed dates to a bowl and let cool slightly.
Fold in the Greek yogurt until the dates are evenly coated and the mixture has a silky, crumbly consistency.
Stir in the toasted walnuts and chopped cilantro; the nuts add crunch while the herbs add brightness.
Drizzle the optional maple syrup over the top for a touch of natural sweetness.
Serve immediately as a warm or room‑temperature brunch bowl.
